title: New ClawHub skill: excalidraw-cli - Generate hand-drawn style Excalidraw diagrams (architecture,
content:
Generate hand-drawn style Excalidraw diagrams (architecture, flow, sequence) as JSON files from the CLI. Edit and merge existing diagrams.

Free + MIT. Live on ClawHub: clawhub.ai/skills/skills/excalidraw-cli

Part of the Hermes autonomous product stack (31 agent-native tools, all CI-tested).
Sponsor if useful: GitHub Sponsors / Buy Me a Coffee.
